context CREATE inv: 
    (parent.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference) implies parent.elements->size() = 1) and 
    (parent.oclIsTypeOf(VariableReference) and 
        (parent.referencedVariable.oclIsTypeOf(QueryVariable) and 
        parent.referencedVariable.queryResult.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference) implies 
        parent.referencedVariable.queryResult.elements->size() = 1)) or 
    (not (parent.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference) or 
        (parent.oclIsTypeOf(VariableReference) and 
            (parent.referencedVariable.oclIsTypeOf(QueryVariable) and 
            parent.referencedVariable.queryResult.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference)))))

{"code":"context CREATE inv: 
    (parent.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference) implies parent.elements->size() = 1) and 
    (parent.oclIsTypeOf(VariableReference) and 
        (parent.referencedVariable.oclIsTypeOf(QueryVariable) and 
        parent.referencedVariable.queryResult.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference) implies 
        parent.referencedVariable.queryResult.elements->size() = 1)) or 
    (not (parent.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference) or 
        (parent.oclIsTypeOf(VariableReference) and 
            (parent.referencedVariable.oclIsTypeOf(QueryVariable) and 
            parent.referencedVariable.queryResult.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference)))))"}
